svg.title: Financial RAG Engine architecture diagram
svg.desc: A 7-stage retrieval and generation pipeline showing ingestion on the left and query processing as a vertical flow, with Redis cache and Pinecone vector DB as external services.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain how the query router classifies messages')
sendPrompt('Explain pronoun resolution and multi-query expansion')
sendPrompt('Explain the semantic cache with Redis')
sendPrompt('Explain the embedding stage for queries')
sendPrompt('Explain the Pinecone bi-encoder retrieval stage')
sendPrompt('Explain the self-RAG grading and retry loop')
